extension.summary: Mark and auto-skip commercials from inside Kodi
extension.description: Fix commercial timestamps during playback with a simple on-screen overlay. Verified segments are written to an EDL sidecar file next to the recording, which Kodi auto-skips on the next playback. Optionally seeds from Plex DVR (comskip) draft markers. Requires direct file playback and a writable media source.
extension.news: 0.5.3 — status/toast labels marquee when the text overflows (labels never focus, so they get scroll=true). 0.5.2 — overlay: arrow-key navigation between button rows; wider mark button (Italian labels fit). 0.5.1 — "Fix this break" now jumps to the detected start for visual verification (nudge, then mark) instead of adopting it unseen — the accept-only-what-you-saw rule covers both boundaries. 0.5.0 — M2: precision nudge row in the overlay (−1s / −0.2s / +1 frame / +0.2s / +1s, live position) and "Fix this break" (adopt a draft's start, re-mark only the end). Draft dedupe is now overlap-based. 0.4.4 — no functional changes: release-pipeline dress rehearsal (script-built package). 0.4.3 — French (fr_FR) and Spanish (es_ES) localisation. 0.4.2 — Italian localisation (it_IT). 0.4.1 — Beat-2 toast: clearer "Go back" label (was "Undo" — nothing was written yet, the button just returns). 0.4.0 — the two beats: landing detector (onPlayBackSeek) fires a Keep/Undo toast for any skip matching a draft; Beat-1 skip offer when PKC is absent. Only an explicit Keep writes the EDL. 0.3.1 — service fetches draft commercial markers automatically at playback start (published to a window property). 0.3.0 — M1 brick 1: Plex bridge (ratingKey resolution via PKC's plex.db, zero-config server+token from PKC settings, draft commercial marker fetch) + 'diag' entry point. 0.2.0 — 'e' shortcut also works in the video OSD; pause-summoned overlay focuses Close. 0.1.0 — M0 scaffold: manual mark → EDL sidecar → auto-skip on next play.
